channel.title: Vancouver Community Directory
channel.description: A community-built directory of 260+ groups, clubs, meetups, and social events in Vancouver, BC. Find your people.

item.title: Run Clubs
item.description: 17 running groups from chill social jogs to marathon training. Most are free — just show up.

item.title: Creative & Art
item.description: 16 art groups and collectives — sketch meetups, drink-and-draws, neurodivergent spaces, and community studios.

item.title: Yoga & Wellness
item.description: 3 free yoga communities plus outdoor summer sessions, inclusive studios, and community wellness classes.

item.title: Tech & Startup
item.description: 39 tech and startup groups — founder circles, dev meetups, AI nights, cybersecurity, and more. Vancouver's largest category.

item.title: Men's Groups
item.description: 6 men's groups — talking circles, dad meetups, wellness groups, and brotherhood communities.

item.title: Book Clubs
item.description: 9 book clubs — silent reading sessions, spirited debates, genre-specific picks, and read-whatever-you-want meetups.

item.title: Dinner & Supper Clubs
item.description: 9 supper clubs pairing strangers over curated meals — home-cooked dinners, secret locations, and wine-paired pop-ups.

item.title: Mindfulness & Meditation
item.description: 11 sitting groups across Buddhist, secular, and wellness traditions. Most welcome beginners and meet weekly.

item.title: Hiking & Outdoors
item.description: 18 hiking groups for every pace — gentle nature walks to serious mountaineering. Several are transit-accessible.

item.title: Photography
item.description: 7 photography groups — street photography collectives, city photowalks, and night/film shooting crews.

item.title: Vinyl & Listening Bars
item.description: Listening bars, iconic record shops, and album-release parties. Vancouver's vinyl community in one place.

item.title: Coworking
item.description: Coworking spaces across Vancouver — from boutique living-room vibes to social-impact hubs and creative studios.

item.title: Social & Friend Clubs
item.description: 20 ways to make friends in Vancouver — park hangs, brunch meetups, wine nights, dodgeball leagues, and more.

item.title: Philosophy & Intellectual
item.description: 9 discussion groups — philosophy circles, Socratic cafes, and deep-conversation meetups for the genuinely curious.

item.title: Chess
item.description: 6 places to play chess in Vancouver — cozy cafe drop-ins, park games, and rated tournaments.

item.title: Cycling
item.description: 12 cycling clubs — social coffee rides, gravel groups, women-and-queer crews, and serious road racing.

item.title: Language Exchange
item.description: 9 language exchange groups — Chinese, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, and ESL conversation clubs.

item.title: Film & Cinema
item.description: 4 film clubs and indie cinemas — social movie nights, art house screenings, and Asia's longest-running film festival.

item.title: Foraging & Nature
item.description: 2 nature communities plus guided foraging tours and mushroom walks. Learn what's edible in BC.

item.title: Maker Spaces
item.description: 3 maker communities plus shared workshops — 3D printing, laser cutting, woodworking, and a tool lending library.

item.title: Resources
item.description: Aggregators, newsletters, Instagram accounts, and other directories for finding community in Vancouver.

item.title: Climbing
item.description: 5 climbing communities and gyms — bouldering meetups, partner-finding groups, and mountaineering clubs.

item.title: Karaoke
item.description: Karaoke nights across Vancouver — private suites, coffee-shop sing-alongs, and bars with a stage.

item.title: Writing
item.description: 8 writing groups — quiet library sessions, genre circles, critique groups, and heritage-house workshops.

item.title: Board Games
item.description: 4 game night groups plus board game cafes with 600+ game libraries. Drop in, no experience needed.

item.title: Volunteer
item.description: Volunteer opportunities in Vancouver — park restoration, food banks, animal shelters, and community stewardship.

item.title: Pottery & Ceramics
item.description: Pottery studios and ceramics classes across Vancouver — drop-in sessions, date nights, and beginner-friendly wheels.

item.title: Pickleball
item.description: 3 pickleball clubs with drop-in games, clinics, and leagues. Membership starts at $10/year.

item.title: Poetry & Spoken Word
item.description: 7 poetry and spoken word communities — slams, tender open mics, and Canada's largest spoken word festival.

item.title: Dance
item.description: 3 free social dance groups — salsa at Robson Square, bachata at Sun Hop Park, and West Coast Swing nights.

item.title: Improv & Comedy
item.description: Improv classes, comedy shows, and open mics — including the birthplace of TheatreSports.

item.title: Pub Trivia
item.description: Weekly pub trivia nights across Vancouver — themed rounds, free entry, and geek-friendly venues.

item.title: Sauna & Cold Plunge
item.description: 3 community groups plus Nordic spas, wood-fired saunas, and free ocean dips at Kits Beach.

item.title: Underground DJ
item.description: Vancouver's underground electronic scene — warehouse parties, free pop-ups, and community-run raves.

item.title: Zine & Risograph
item.description: Zine fairs, riso studios, and DIY publishing workshops. Vancouver's small-press scene in one place.

item.title: Birdwatching
item.description: 7 birding groups — guided walks, expert-led field trips, youth programs, and a free two-week festival in May.

item.title: Music & Open Mic
item.description: 3 music communities plus weekly open mics and jam nights across Vancouver's cafes, pubs, and halls.

item.title: Astronomy & Stargazing
item.description: 5 astronomy groups — star parties, free observatory nights at Vanier Park, and dark-sky camping trips.

item.title: Tarot & Astrology
item.description: 5 tarot and astrology groups — practice meetups, moon circles, and spiritual exploration communities.
